programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Naked cleaner Elleigha meets perfectionist chef Louis and the chemistry is strong. Caitlin and Lucy try dating for the first time. And, can 40-year-old Asher be able to heal his past wounds?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil head to Nottingham, where Lexie and Ed are at a stalemate. Their four-bed, one-bathroom home is fit to burst, and Ed just wants to pack up and move to a bigger house. But Lexie thinks, with Kirsties help, that the house could work.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a sublime dukkah roast lamb feast with a fantastic hack to speed up cooking.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in Sussex looking for two homes for two very different sets of house hunters. Ashlee Newton is looking for her first home after nine years of saving, and wants a period flat near in Brighton or Hove. After eight years of living apart, architectural historian Colin Amery and his partner Robin Balance, a property renovation manager, are looking to find their first home together.

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey helps a father and daughter in Suffolk whose hopes for a fresh start after a bereavement were dashed when building work went badly wrong, leaving them tens of thousands of pounds out of pocket.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host, teaching assistant Michelle, hopes to share her Portuguese and American culinary heritage. Describing herself as the drunk Martha Stewart, she believes the love she puts into her menu will compensate for less-than-perfect food.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: First up, Louise and Daga host at Hotel Penzance in Cornwall, where they hope to wow their guests with breathtaking views. But rather than appreciating the vibrant vista out of the window, some of the BandBers are too preoccupied with their tellies.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Renovation rookies Angie and Ash dream big in the Italian Alps. Aggi and Camille join forces to reopen a French restaurant. Harriet and Mondo boost their Portuguese business.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gill and Chris are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary in style by finding their very own cave house in Granadas gorgeous countryside. Can Laura Hamilton deliver the perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Craig Rowe is back in Carcassonne to catch up with Sue and Tony, who found their dream house in this stunning part of southwest France. Sara Damergi is in old-town Oliva in Spain, where sisters Sheila and Pam reconnected with their Spanish roots.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Inverness, first to host is proud Scot and National Heritage worker Gillian Sutherland. Gillians dinner party is a true Scottish affair and shes hoping her Touch of Tartan theme, with traditional Scottish menu, top quality local produce and bagpipes galore, will win over her guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its night two of the competition in Inverness, where designer label fanatic Melissa Kirby has given herself a sneaky advantage. Not only has she had cooking lessons from one of Invernesss best chefs, shes also cheated by having him make her gravy and crumble top. Gillians none too impressed when she finds out.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Inverness, property tycoon David Edes hosts a nautical evening. David is a teetotaller and plans a menu of `basic but wholesome food - making his guests wary. A night of suspicion and hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rock n roll hairdresser Zarina Ainslie is the latest to host in Inverness. The tattooed party girl claims to be an amazing cook. Could she be the dark horse of the competition?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in Inverness and ex-professional footballer Jamie Tulloch has gone to town making sure his ingredients are all as fresh and local as possible. Can he win over super-critical David? Will his unexpected Scottish dance troupe as entertainment help or hinder his chances?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Christine and Howard have decided to fulfil their dream of buying a place in the historic town of Mojácar in Spains Almería region. Can Lee Juggurnauth find the perfect place for £50k?

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Keith and Kate return to the Scottish seaside town of Dunoon, where Kate has fond memories and family ties. But making a Victorian house work as a modern home proves challenging.

programme.title: Roman Empire by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: On the final leg of her journey, Alice heads south to Tarragona, once the capital of Iberian Rome. She learns how the Romans conquered Spain and gained control of the entire Mediterranean.

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious journey across Devon in an 80-year-old steamroller and near Falmouth, two champion free divers explore a spectacular underwater cave.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A new series at Queens, Nottingham. Ronalds has sliced through his ankle at work. Owens put his shoulder out. And Jeremys crash on a bike leads to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Confessions of a Cam Girl
programme.desc: The naked truth on sex camming with the intimate stories of different girls building empires from their bedrooms - like Maya, who quit her medical degree to go on camera full-time.

programme.title: The Far Country
programme.desc: Classic tale in which a cowboys dreams of peace and prosperity in the Canadian gold towns are unexpectedly shattered by a corrupt sheriff. The unscrupulous lawman steals the cowboys valuable herd of cattle and kills his close friend, leaving him with no option but to fight back.

programme.title: Chuka
programme.desc: Frontier yarn about an itinerant gunfighter who arrives at a remote cavalry outpost run by a disgraced English officer. The gunman is reunited with a woman from whom he has long been separated, but the prospect of happiness is undermined by the threat of an impending Indian attack. When the hostiles finally do move against the fort, the sole slender chance for survival lies with the gunfighters ability to broker a peace agreement.

programme.desc: EAMT Tamie attempts to rescue a cat stuck in a tall palm tree, while Racelle investigates reports of a dog breeder whos allowing dogs and puppies to live in filthy conditions.

programme.desc: Terri attends the exam of Charlie the tiger to see if his tumours were successfully treated. And, Bindi helps develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: When an adopted dog mysteriously appears in a Mississippi shelter, Tania and Earl go to the rescue. Parolee Joe is shaken after separating two stray dogs fighting.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Alyssas cat, Tosh, terrorises her boyfriend Andy; Eric and Kaotars cat, Vincent, tries escaping.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Mudgie has a shattered pelvis and Godzilla is deaf, the lack of communication leads to keeping them separated, Erics cat Sweet Pea is peeing all over the apartment and roommate Dustin threatens to move out.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: The marine team hunt for a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico, a man is suspected of pouching deer out of season, and the wardens inspect a drug operation.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Denvers most passionate and persevering veterinarian is back - flip flops, long hair, tattoos and all - to tackle high-stress situations at his vet clinic Planned Pethood Plus.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and his team descend upon Virginia for the first time to bring the tree house revolution to Bella Rose Plantation. Drawing on the architectural innovations of Thomas Jefferson, Pete designs a luxurious two-story tree house with colonial columns.

programme.title: Sharks and the City: New York
programme.desc: For decades great white shark numbers fell in the waters around New York. With seals now back in the city harbour, are the sharks returning? Biologist Craig OConnell finds out.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto, Charlotte, Eivin and Eve harvest a cow to stock up on meat for winter. At the head of the bay, Atz Seniors range riding skills are tested.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: The Haunted

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: While Dr Amy tackles exploratory surgery on a cat with a strange appetite, Dr Jeff helps an injured tiger.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete descends upon western Washington to make a tree house for action and relaxation. With a 55-foot-long bouncy-bridge entryway into a 20-foot-high structure and a zip line that travels through the forest, this tree house generates non-stop thrills.

programme.title: The Pool Master
programme.desc: Anthony helps a busy firefighting farmer and his wife fix a project that started as a muddy hole and turn it into a natural pool complete with an outdoor rock shower and fire hydrant.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: At the head of the bay, Atz Sr. divulges the secrets of the range rider to Atz Lee and Elvin and Otto, Charlotte and August must transform more than 1,000 pounds of metal pipe into a working chimney.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.sub-title: Bam Bams Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches, forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam Bam must play nice with his siblings to break ground on his homestead.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.sub-title: Lady in White / Thump in the Night
programme.desc: Animals begin reacting to something no one can see. Soon, the humans began seeing what the animals were seeing: the ghost of a woman who once lived near the house.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of dangerous saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco. Meanwhile, Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy.

programme.title: Sharks and the City: New York
programme.desc: For decades great white shark numbers fell in the waters around New York. With seals now back in the city harbour, are the sharks returning? Biologist Craig OConnell finds out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete descends upon western Washington to make a tree house for action and relaxation. With a 55-foot-long bouncy-bridge entryway into a 20-foot-high structure and a zip line that travels through the forest, this tree house generates non-stop thrills.

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia
programme.desc: A shocking machete attack on a puppy leaves the medical team fighting to save his life. The Animal Cops want justice, and so embark on a hunt for his attacker.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Ram Chand, working a simple job despite his qualifications, meets Ravi Chand who is on the verge of suicide. Convincing him to stay alive and then move in with him, Ram helps Ravi find a job, which in turn finds him a wife. When Ram himself finds what he thinks may be a suitable wife he sends a picture to Ravi for approval, but he reproaches him over his choice and is elusive in his reasons why.

programme.title: Love Mocktail
programme.desc: Aadi meets young Adithi en route to Udupi. On their journey together, Aadi narrates the three different times he has been in love in life.

programme.title: Blood Relation
programme.desc: Bringing the best in entertainment.

programme.title: Kundan
programme.desc: A wealthy criminal has the entire family of a newspaper editor murdered after he is exposed.

programme.title: Blackmail
programme.desc: A vengeful ex-con kidnaps the son of the cop who put him behind bars.

programme.title: Fifty/Fifty
programme.desc: Two soldiers of fortune set out on a mission to depose a Far East military leader, but they are double-crossed.

programme.title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
programme.desc: An old wealthy woman is traumatised when her husband is killed and her sons abducted. She goes in a desperate search for them and finds two young men who are wearing the family heirloom and accepts them as her sons, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Falak
programme.desc: Two partners, Murlidhar and Narang, betray their third partner and take over his business.

programme.title: Yeh Hai Judgement - Hang Till Death

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: C.J. befriends an eccentric beach dweller who thanks her with a generous gift; a rebellious Hobie takes a lifeguard trainee out for some fun.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch becomes stranded on an uninhabited island with a socialite who "bought" him in a bachelor auction; Cody joins a roller hockey team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An extremely hot day brings lots of people and problems to the beach, including an overzealous Secret Service agent planning a visit by the president.

programme.desc: Whilst waiting for Bernadette on a date, Bernie is washed out to sea on a piece of driftwood. Oona hastily seeks Marvins help, knowing time is of the essence.

programme.desc: Tha Boban is Fuigheag a dol air misean an-diugh is feumar deagh bhalaist! Boban and Fuigheag are going on a mission today and good balance is needed!

programme.title: Peataichean
programme.desc: Eilidh visits Angus and his four handsome and fun-loving cats. We find out how to look after cats and about all the lovely stuff Angus, Jasper, Parsley, Roxy and Dylan get up to together.

programme.title: AH-AH
programme.desc: No-No and Magaiveur want to start a collection like many of their friends. After trying stones and then sticks, No-No eventually falls in love with an umbrella and starts picking them up wherever he sees them.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip wants Posy to go to the park to meet their friends, but she wants to stay home and have a pyjama day. Pip tries to persuade Posy to come to the park.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy promise one another that they will wear their silly hats to the park. But when Pip arrives at the park, Posy isnt wearing hers.

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: A bedtime story for young children. Catriona Murray reads Tad.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an Ath-dhoras
programme.desc: Than Trùmpaid Rìoghail air a dhol air chall - càite am burrainn dhi a bhith? Stella wants to be normal and thinks that royal procedures should be put to one side. The royal trumpet has gone missing, and its impossible to find it anywhere.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an Ath-dhoras
programme.desc: Abair gu bheil Bleideag iarratach s Stella na manaidsear-sgìreil oirr. Stella finds herself appointed as Bleideags community manager, and it turns out that she is very demanding for such a small white rabbit.

programme.title: Bogaisean is Gumbalan
programme.desc: When the gumbles are attacked by one of Smiggless dream creatures, Merri and Jolli wake Smiggles up and get captured in the process. Tink decides to impersonate a Smiggles dream creature to save his friends.

programme.title: An Doimhne
programme.desc: Cà l a h-uile duine bhon Orca Dhorch? Wheres everyone from the Dark Orca?

programme.title: Slighe Chladach Fiobha
programme.desc: Iagan finds out why the area is synonymous with golf and sees the magnificent Rock and Spindle sea stack. He also finds out about the project to restore the sand dunes at the famous West Sands beach in St Andrews, plus looks at the Tay Bridges up close and visits Lindores Abbey and Distillery.

programme.title: SpeakGaelic

programme.desc: Meet learner and musician Teya-Jean Bawden who lives near Beauly. Plus, Calum Maclean goes in search of some tasty match-day treats in Kilmarnock.

programme.desc: The time has come, and Peter is ready to buy some Highland cows. Là na Fèille ann agus tha Pàdruig deiseil airson crodh Gàidhealach a cheannach.

programme.title: Trusadh

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: From the bone-dry deserts of the Atacama, where penguins weave their way through a minefield of snapping sea lions, to the lush cloud forests of the Andes, where Andean bears scale 30-metre trees in search of elusive fruits, South America is full of the unusual and ingenious.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisations religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Call My Bluff
programme.desc: Robert Robinson hosts the panel game of word definitions and deceptions. Team captains Frank Muir and Patrick Campbell are joined by guests Sinead Cusak, Ian Ogilvy, Miles Kington and Penelope Keith.

programme.title: Face the Music
programme.desc: Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against Joyce Grenfell, Robin Ray and Derek Hart. The guest musician is soprano Isobel Baillie.

programme.title: The Unseen Alistair Cooke
programme.desc: A revealing portrait of one of the most celebrated broadcasters of the 20th century, Alisdair Cooke, whose Radio 4 programme `Letter from America spanned 58 years. Seen for the first time are extraordinary 8mm home movies shot by Cooke from 1933 onwards, charting his discovery of America, his passions and his friendships, including his close friendship with Charlie Chaplin.

programme.title: Imagine...
programme.sub-title: Rose Wylie: This Rose is Blooming
programme.desc: Very few people would have recognised the name Rose Wylie until this remarkable artist was in her mid 70s. Youthful, playful and unpredictable at the age of 83, she is an artist in her prime, her exuberant large-scale canvasses exhibited worldwide.

programme.title: Nature and Us: A History through Art
programme.desc: James explores how Piet Mondrian gradually leaves nature behind, tidying up the messy reality of nature into abstract lines. Meet artist Yang Yongliang whose sprawling digital landscapes ask questions about the drive for rapid urbanisation.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: Artist Mike and his wife Kate run `Iona Wool selling ethical wool products and crafts. The colours of their stock mean that Mike and Kate want minimal colour added to the shop, which is a challenge for Banjo, as his designs are often colourful.

programme.title: Sportscene

programme.title: Life On the Bay
programme.desc: Its a glorious summer in Fife, and one of the parks longest-serving staff, Billy, is preparing for a unique challenge - a skydive to mark his 80th birthday. The whole team is pulling together to plan a secret surprise celebration for Billy.

programme.title: Life On the Bay
programme.desc: The holiday park needs 14 brand new caravans, and that means negotiation time for the Wallace family. A trip to the manufacturer gets the deal done, but there is still a race against time to get one holiday home installed and ready for paying guests.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: Banjo tackles a unique brief at the Western Isles Hotel in Tobermory, on the Isle of Mull. The hotel has welcomed guests for over 140 years. Banjo must transform the dual function room into a spa by day and a parlour bar by night.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: Crofters DJ and partner Lindsay want to turn their unloved breeze-block garage into a homely croft shop where they can sell their produce. The dull building has no character, so Banjo and his team work from scratch to transform this empty space.

programme.title: River City
programme.desc: A determined Viv carries out a plan to get Alex onside, but it becomes clear she underestimates him. Scarlett goes out of her way to support a grateful Sam, a suspicious DCI Douglas does some digging, and Eddie grows increasingly frustrated with Francis.

programme.title: Two Doors Down
programme.desc: Beth has organised the perfect baby shower for mum-to-be Sophie. Everyone is invited and Christine has even asked Pat from over the back, who shes assuming is going to be the babys godmother.

programme.title: Scotcast
programme.desc: Conversation about Scotlands biggest news stories, hosted by Martin Geissler.

programme.title: Not Your Average Family
programme.desc: Trans influencer Charlie stops testosterone to restart his menstrual cycle, with dramatic consequences. Meanwhile, Lauren prepares for motherhood by facing her debilitating fear of sickness.

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: The boarders try to impress when they meet the parents - but will they succeed? Abby is confronted by Tobys mum about his future, and Cheddars dad gives Femi a daring challenge.

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Femi is determined to take Cheddar down in the school elections, but at what cost? Leah is excited about Benjamin, but Felix gets in the way, and Toby has girlfriend troubles.

programme.title: The Catch-Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news.

programme.title: Waterloo Road
programme.desc: Lorna sexes up her image in a bid to win her husband back, but his attentions are definitely elsewhere. Meanwhile, authoritarian English teacher Grantly thinks a disruptive boy may be a drug addict, but kind-hearted Kim is determined to prove him wrong, and cheating teacher Steph fakes a break-in.

programme.title: Waterloo Road
programme.desc: The future of the school is in jeopardy and is under threat of closure. A school trip to the museum descends into chaos and Tom and Izzie finally give in to their passion.

programme.title: The Jetty
programme.desc: Reeling from the discovery of a body in the lake, Ember wrestles with the emerging truth about Mack. As the walls close in on her, Ember finds herself reaching breaking point.

programme.title: The Jetty
programme.desc: Determined to protect Hannah, Ember must face up to the possibility that she might have been married to a murderer, amidst the search to finally uncover the truth of what happened to Amy.

programme.title: Film Club
programme.desc: Best friends Evie and Noa have watched films together since they first met. But now Noa has news which is set to change everything.

programme.title: Film Club
programme.desc: While Noa attends a taster day for his new job in Bristol, Evie pulls out all the stops for Film Club, theres a lot riding on tonight.

programme.title: Film Club
programme.desc: Evies still reeling from the message she saw on Noas phone. But when the two are left alone together, something extraordinary happens. Is it the start of a new journey for Evie?

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: This is an average story of a very average woman. Of Spud, carer for her father, who cooks, cleans and serves badly and half-heartedly. A woman who is never seen or thanked. Ignored. A woman who, in spite of what society tells her, does not feel bad about herself. Who, despite not being young, or a mother, or, worst of all, beautiful, is actually quite happy in herself, if not her life. Then, one day, her dad dies, making her realise that she may have to come out of the shadows and be seen.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May seek petrolhead heaven in three £1,500 pound rear-wheel drive coupes and somehow find themselves entered in a terrifying French ice race. Meanwhile, Richard tries to speed up summer holiday flights by inventing the sport of airport vehicle racing, Jeremy walks with dinosaurs in the new BMW Z4, and actress Sienna Miller is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: The Jetty
programme.desc: Reeling from the discovery of a body in the lake, Ember wrestles with the emerging truth about Mack. As the walls close in on her, Ember finds herself reaching breaking point.

programme.title: The Jetty

programme.title: The Jetty
programme.desc: Determined to protect Hannah, Ember must face up to the possibility that she might have been married to a murderer, amidst the search to finally uncover the truth of what happened to Amy.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: In 2012, photojournalists John Cantlie and James Foley chase a scoop in Syria, but their reporting draws the attention of jihadists, and the net closes in on them.

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Spring is in full stride at Longmeadow, and Monty gets straight to work - bringing new borders to life, reviving winter-worn houseplants and priming his pelargoniums for a standout summer.

programme.title: This Is BBC TWO
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The teams restorations include an exquisite Guyanese bangle, an electric guitar with a past, a leather tallit bag and a familys rediscovered set of Kent peg tiles.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Kelly Cates presents highlights from the days three Premier League games, including the Tyne-Wear derby between Newcastle and Sunderland. Elsewhere, Aston Villa face West Ham, and struggling Tottenham Hotspur play Nottingham Forest in a big game towards the bottom of the table.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: Engaging conversation about the political issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight contestants compete in a series of fast-paced quiz battles in an attempt to eliminate their opponents from the days game and walk away with a cash prize.

programme.title: Chess Masters: The Endgame
programme.desc: The five remaining players from the second heat return to the Great Hall to battle it out for a place in the quarter-finals.

programme.title: Clive Myries Italian Roadtrip
programme.desc: Starting at his favourite holiday spot on the Amalfi coast, Clive goes inland to a mozzarella factory, where he discovers how to make everyones favourite stringy cheese. Next, he heads to Capri, where he makes his wife Catherine a pair of the Capri sandals made famous by Jackie Kennedy and spends the evening singing Italian folk songs on stage at a club favoured by A-listers like Beyonce and Jay Z.

programme.title: Serengeti
programme.desc: The dry season is now upon the animals of the Serengeti, the toughest of times for some but a food bonanza for others. The increasing drought turns the waterhole into a death trap for the herds, but for the lions its a gift and Kali and her cubs are finally able to enjoy life back in the heart of the pride.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Knebworth House hosts a team of experts who determine the value of treasures, such as a diamond brooch and a marine chronometer.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Members of the public try and make money out of their antiques.

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Amy Gledhill, Jacqui Joseph, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen and Tim Vine test their general knowledge skills on this weeks Richard Osmans House of Games: Champions.

programme.title: Do You Know Your Place?
programme.desc: The tour reaches Bamburgh as Vernon Kay and unreliable guide Paul Gorton ask comedian Susan Calman, internet star Max Fosh and DJ Noreen Khan to sort the accurate from the adventurous in Bamburgh.

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: Bringing forensic journalism from all corners of the world by BBC Eye, the World Services critically acclaimed investigative unit, and featuring expert global correspondents getting to the heart of the biggest international stories.

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotlands Lochs
programme.desc: From a mythic past, when kelpies lurked in the lochs of the Trossachs, Paul travels through old Perthshire. He lends a hand bringing in the cattle and hears how Rob Roy MacGregor might not have been the romantic figure of popular fiction. Was he a hero or just a cattle thief? At Rob Roys graveside, Paul meets a man who casts doubts on the clansmans last resting place.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Clive Myrie asks the questions in another semi-final. Specialist subjects include Clint Eastwoods western films and the footballer Cyrille Regis.

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: The quarter-final stage nears its conclusion. Two places in the semi-finals are still up for grabs - both teams are hoping to take one of them. Amol Rajan asks the questions.

programme.title: Clash of the Super Powers: America v China
programme.desc: Donald Trump comes to office in 2017 and upends Americas relationship with Beijing. He promises to make China pay, but when he starts a trade war, Xi Jinping fights back.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob are fishing for tench - a fish they have not targeted since the first series. They arrive at Rocklands Mere, a secluded hidden gem in the quaint village of Rocklands St Peter and settle down to fish.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Featuring extensive coverage of the days top national and international news stories, along with explanations about the context and potential aftereffects.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Europe on the Edge with Katya Adler
programme.desc: Katya continues her journey through Spain, training with a team of firefighters, and heads to France, witnessing a rocket launch in French Guiana and learning about Frances welfare state in Paris.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: Acclaimed paleontologist Mary Anning works alone selling common fossils to tourists to support her ailing mother, but a chance job offer changes her life when a visitor hires her to care for his wife.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Adam Henson and Anita Rani head to Devon to look at all stages of lambing, the success of which can shape a farms fortunes for months to come.

programme.title: We Might Regret This
programme.desc: After an intense briefing on the influencer campaign from the Olivias, Freyas misgivings about the whole endeavour are at an all-time high. Jo is in less of a celebratory mood and is stunned to find a surprise visitor at the hen do.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Caddy the Cadborosaurus, the Lubbock Lights, and Living Mummy
programme.desc: A fisherman possibly captures footage of a giant sea serpent, hundreds of people witness mysterious flashing blue and green lights in Lubbock, Texas, and a centuries-old monk attempts to mummify himself.

programme.title: Irish Pickers
programme.desc: Top Dublin dealer Ian Dowling and his mate Butzy head south of Dublin to County Wexford and three picking locations. In Wexford town they visit the Sky and The Ground pub where hoarder Landlord Johnny Barons wife Nuala thinks its time for a clear-out of her husbands cluttered attic. At Loch Garman antiques the boys meet up with owner William Plummer, whos recently opened his doors to the public and Ian is the first dealer through the door.

programme.title: Irish Pickers
programme.desc: Ian and Butzy make a trip across the Irish Midlands towards County Galway. They attend an auction which is selling fittings from the 1914 cruise ship Britannic, sister ship to the Titanic, the original bar is listed at ?300,000. At Castle Ellen, an old stately home near Athenry in County Galway, Ian works hard to prize away objects from profuse collector Michael Keaney.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and his team of antique dealers are in Morecambe where a condiment set with a famous name attached to it turns up on Cheryl Hakeneys table but will she realise? Alison Chapman surprises the owner of a Japanese vase and a riot ensues on Tim Hogarths table when a colourful seller brings in their gold.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller comes in with a poster by Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec. Meanwhile, Chum unboxes some 1912 Yale baseball uniforms. Then, Rick takes a look at a ukulele from 1919. And later, testing out a restored Track Rabbit go-kart.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison head for Marks shed in Shrewsbury to pick up a pile of trinkets before travelling to an auction in Tewkesbury, hoping for something bigger to take to their second Kempton autojumble.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene is groomed to vanquish the competition, Ivy learns an important locker lesson and Darrell spends the most money of his career.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and Rene team up in an attempt to shut Darrell and Brandon out of the bidding. Jarrod and Brandi fall in love with locker buying again.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Dramatic auction action. Are Brandon and Lori feeling the thrill of taxidermy when a dead cow pitches up in one of their storage unit lots?

programme.title: Container Wars
programme.desc: A tiff over a container threatens Mo and Tys partnership.

programme.desc: Troy and Pickle help a friend look for his lost dog; Bill and Tes search for pythons in a spot ravaged by wildfires; Zak and Bruce investigate an abandoned boatyard; Dusty hunts in an area with a dark past.

programme.desc: The team ignites a massive bonfire to investigate the Bubble. But what appears in the smoke is more chilling than anyone expected.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer, Shaun and the flock are convinced that a monster is at loose on the farm and hide in the barn. But what exactly is it they are afraid of?

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Brunel, the crazed time-travelling Victorian gentlechimp, is back and determined to change history so Danger Mouse and Penfold never meet.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Hoofiuss next quest will be his 1000th, so he decides to wait for a really heroic one and insists that his friends quest without him.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.sub-title: The Fantastical World of Bobbly Wobbly
programme.desc: Boy is given a special gift by his siblings: a ticket to tour the factory where his prized bobbleheads are made.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: News magazine keeping young viewers up to date with the latest stories and events happening at home and abroad.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings find a mask that terrifies anyone who looks at it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in some help.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Odd Squad is asked to make a recruitment commercial, Ms O proves difficult.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Dennis and his mates rebel against an outbreak of unfair fun-killing rules that are being imposed on Beanotown.

programme.title: Danny and Mick
programme.desc: Danny and Mick are suffering from the heat and break the heating system trying to make themselves cooler. They turn the whole leisure centre into a freezing, icy and slippery wonderland. Can they fix it?

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.desc: Telekinesis, the power to be able to move things with the mind, might be popular in films but its not possible in reality. While watching his favourite show about a villain who can lift anything with mind-power, our hero finds out that he can do it, too. And not only that, he finds out that the villain in the show is real when he goes outside to put the rubbish out. Before long the two are pitched in a mind-power battle in the alley by the recycling bins.

programme.title: Bitesize: 5-7 Year Olds
programme.desc: Learn about naming, describing and comparing materials.

programme.title: One Zoo Three
programme.desc: The brothers visit Belgiums Pairi Daiza Zoo to meet pandas, walruses, penguins and the golden takin, all animals that have adapted to survive in the coldest climates.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Daily Life can be a bit of a grind, but not as much as it was in the past! Rattus takes us round the clock, revealing daily routines throughout history, from waking in Ancient Egypt to Medieval Loo Man.

programme.title: Shark Bites
programme.desc: Steve Backshall meets the ragged tooth shark with its mouth thats overflowing with terrifying teeth. Steve heads out on a dive after dark to see these fearsome fangs for himself, before revealing their sinister secret in his shark lab.

programme.title: Art Ninja
programme.desc: Ricky is surprised to find out that Rich has embraced his inner hippie and wants to become `at one with nature. It inspires Ricky to make a pineapple plant pot and the Grand Master to make flowers that are blooming marvellous.

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.sub-title: Dragons Blood, Rude Flowers and Wibbly Wobbly Gravity
programme.desc: Big Brain has a chemical catastrophe, Sir Isaac Newton rides a coaster again, with shocking results, Loofah is after a murderer, and Dr Henry VIII on call!

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steves search for deadly animals takes him to South Africa. This time theyre looking for the ferocious great white shark. Just as feared by many is the cape buffalo, known locally as the black-death. Steve takes to the skies to track down a huge heard of this notoriously bad tempered bovine beast before being charmed by the snake-stomping secretary bird.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: 3, 2, 1 blast off! Dr Chris and Dr Xand explore what happens to the human body in space, tackling the big body questions on everyones lips - what happens to your snot when you sneeze, do you really get taller, and how do you poo and wee in zero gravity? Find out as Dr Chris boards an unusual flight to experience being weightless, and Dr Xand meets a real astronaut. Plus discover the amazing exercise machine that will change lives for astronauts and people on earth alike.

programme.title: Sketchy Comedy
programme.desc: A football, biscuit, sofa bed and pair of shoes are among the items getting the Sketchy treatment!

programme.title: Andy And The Band
programme.desc: Danny needs a cake for his parents wedding, and fast! The band deliver a cake, but Macs size-shifting machine causes chaos, and they have an angry wedding organiser to contend with.

programme.title: A Kind of Spark
programme.desc: Bonnie causes chaos in the Darrow house by turning a sleepover into a party. Meanwhile, a clue brings Addie closer to solving the bookshop mystery.

programme.title: Gifted
programme.sub-title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: Amanda and Tracey find themselves in a sticky situation - will they be willing to help each other? Margery wants revenge and puts her plan into motion.

programme.title: High Hoops
programme.desc: Its teachers v students week - can the Vipers help win the cup, become school heroes and impress Aoifes new crush, Jamie?

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: In order to raise funds for a potential new dancer who cant afford competitive dance, TNS West throws a dance-a-thon fundraiser, which is attended by some exciting guest stars. Meanwhile, Noah and Jacquie disagree on who the enemies are.

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.sub-title: The Last Day of Malory Towers
programme.desc: On her last day, Darrell has to reveal Lilys plans before Malory Towers is lost forever.

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Battle ensues when the pigs muscle in on Shauns private club and steal all the pizza. Shaun, Bitzer and the flock mount a rescue mission for Timmy who the pigs have taken hostage.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Priding herself on being the only flying hero, Twinkle is upset by Herberts flying invention, and the pair risk a quest by being too competitive.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Mouse buys a videogame that is supposed to teach the family teamwork. When they end up bickering as they play, Mouse creates a robot that turns off the game if they argue.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings get into a fight over the last jar of chocolate spread in the cabin and it ends up sinking to the bottom of the lagoon.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck has a job punting tourists along the waterways, but bored Frog thinks he can do a better job. Thanks to Frogs interference, the pair wind up going on a wild trip down the rapids.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patricks lemonade stand is not doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: Whats New Scooby-Doo?
programme.desc: The gang attend a Renaissance faire, where a dragon interrupts their fun.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Orli and a different Ozzie from a movie star dimension need to stop a villain whos making the town go purple one person at a time.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Beast Boy is fired and replaced with the Wonder Twins.

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: Roy and Ult return to the Lost Mayo Maze for a rematch with Lucario.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have organised a mega party at the cabin. This is obviously not to Grizzys liking and the bear throws them out. The Lemmings discover a cave where the party is even more fun, but their ruckus drives out the bats.

programme.title: Stage Stars
programme.desc: Its fireworks night, theres a big display at school and everyone is there. The Encore dancers set up a stall to raise money for costumes and have enough sweets and treats for everyone - but they need to sell them all. After months of rehearsals, its finally opening night for Anything Goes, but will the cast hold their nerve and put on an outstanding performance?

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: What a Rollercoaster! Why does your tummy flip on a rollercoaster? We also find out how triage works in hospital.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Emily shows up to help Riley get The Next Step to Regionals, but she has to make some hard choices to do it.

programme.title: So Awkward Academy
programme.desc: Comedy series about socially awkward kids and kooky teachers navigating the chaos of school life.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: This Is CBeebies
programme.desc: Welcome to the CBeebies channel. Programmes start at 6.00am.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of a young bear called Tish, her bear family and her larger-than-life imaginary friend Tash, as they learn about the world around them.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula are playing a vooshing game with their favourite toys, Hoppity Voosh and Hippo Fairy. They throw them into the air to see how high they can fly, but Sulas hippo gets stuck in a tree. Bing throws Hoppity up to save her, but Hoppity gets stuck too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of I Spy where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Tee thinks his skateboard is the best toy in the world, until he sees Tomos remote-controlled truck. The pair swap toys, but Tee soon wants his skateboard back.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea blows all the lanterns away during the Lantern Festival. Supertato struggles to get them all back and needs Broccolis help to save the day.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing has broken his arm and is struggling to do his usual activities. Petting Arlo hurts, playing with blocks hurts, and even drinking juice hurts. But when Bing and Sula draw together it doesnt hurt.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: How hard can it be to pick one plant at the top of a mountain with Mojos Chopper Top? Pretty hard when theres a hungry goat who wants that plant even more than they do!

programme.title: Hey Duggees Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken AandE, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine and the Penguins give facts about whats hot and whats not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big, friendly dog who runs The Squirrel Club, an after-school activity club where children can learn and take part in all kinds of activities, have fun adventures, and earn badges for their achievements.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it. He tries to create his own, bigger rainbow, ignoring Ubercorns warnings that their ends can never be reached. When he instead causes a huge storm to appear, the Go Jetters must work fast to stop the Academy from flooding.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Seed Snatch
programme.desc: When Mr McGregor fills a bird table with sunflower seeds, Squirrel Nutkin becomes dangerously obsessed with raiding it.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea - and onto land. With new rides and new friends, they are prepared to protect any habitats and animals at risk on land or under the water.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: A little block falls out of the sky, meets her numberling and discovers one wonderful world, singing and counting to one.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: D is ready to rock - he has his drumsticks but nothing to bang on. With a little help from his friends, he tries a pan and a pin. How can he deliver his dazzling drum solo? This episode introduces the letter D and the words sat, pad, pan, pin, tap and din.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Love Monster doesnt like the beach but tries to give it another go by looking for an aspect of it that he can enjoy.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat, a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the SingSong Forest, who sings a spider rhyme, all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, its the exceptional painter Spinach creating Kiwis portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Coco are drawing Gilly a picture. When she and Popsie arrive, Bing goes to say hello, but while he does so Charlie makes a big squiggle on Bings drawing. Gilly shows them a game called `squiggling. You draw a squiggle, and then your partner turns that squiggle into a new drawing. Bing loves this game and turns Charlies squiggle into Popsie.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `fox, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. See a red fox, a furry fox, a fast fox and a fantastic fox. Dee spies a white fox in the snow, cheers up a chicken-pox-fox and meets a family fox.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Lu refuses a snack that turns out to be yummier than shed imagined.

programme.title: Piggy Builders
programme.desc: Cherry starts Cherrys News with a giant speaker but has no news to share. What she doesnt know is that everyone in Fine Forest, including the Piggies, needs help!

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos watch some children collecting shells on a beach. The Twirlywoos decide theyd like to try collecting shells too, but its not long before they start collecting lots of other things they find on the beach.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friends go on a fruit picking adventure. Meanwhile, Aunt Polly judges the annual Fabulous Fruit Competition, but what has Mr Tumble done to Grandads strawberries?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Its breakfast time for the children in Tummy Tales and in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies wake up and cant decide whether to have tubby custard or tubby toast, so they have both!

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Giovanna and Baby Bear welcome babies Reau, Arlo, Oliver, Elijah, Zuri and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Parents, carers and their babies at home are invited to join in with all the fun activities too.

programme.title: I Spy, You Spy
programme.desc: Elsee joins her friend Ellie-Mai in the park for a picnic and a game of I Spy.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Today, Aaron, Isla and Abbie embark on an exciting spring adventure around the garden, discovering the abundance of colours popping up in their inner-city oasis. But why does the garden become more colourful during spring? Our very own gardening guru, Chatterpot, provides the clues to their horticultural questions.

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Its the day of the annual Teddy Bear Party. Murphi is making sandwiches, and Rebecca has made jelly. A little mishap inspires Murphis first monster make - a tiny toadstool pot. The Mini Monsters create paper cup critter puppets, and Rebeccas cousin, Fiona, calls to share her idea for a cupcake case flower. Murphis mega monster make is a teddy bear box, helped by some round boxes brought along by the Recycling Express.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Split becomes protective of a young seedling resembling their signature sprout.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey struggles to learn how to ride her bike, but finds inspiration when she watches her friends determination with their own tasks.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big, friendly dog who runs The Squirrel Club, an after-school activity club where children can learn and take part in all kinds of activities, have fun adventures, and earn badges for their achievements.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: A Hey Duggee take on the classic `Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes sung by Lord Fingal, Hedgley, the Old Deers and Eugene.

programme.title: Lets Go for a Walk
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers walk through the woods to a place where they can play a spooky game. On the way they exlore the roots of a tree, find a mini waterfall, squelch in the mud and even clean themselves like ducks!

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Audrey and her family visit a farm. They meet some of the animals up close, and Audrey feeds the guinea pigs with a carrot treat before enjoying cuddles with a baby goat. Then its off for a tractor ride, where Audrey meets a horse with a moustache!

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Diellzas family comes from Kosovo. She makes a traditional recipe of stuffed peppers. Diellza has lovely colourful ingredients for her stuffed peppers such as spring onions, sweetcorn, grated carrot.

programme.title: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Rory and Sandy are searching for lizards while Chantelle discovers what they eat. Find out how lizards help the eco-system and try a Teeny Tiny Task, lizard camouflage art.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Kika is a golden Labrador and a guide dog for her owner Dr Amit, who is blind. She is trained to use her supersight to help him do as many things as he can by himself. Together, they make the best team. Kika needs to help Dr Amit catch a train to the city. First, they must walk to the station. Kika knows the way like the back of her paw, but there are some important things they must do along the way.

programme.title: Go Wild
programme.sub-title: Aneeshwar and Lizzie: Eland and Colobus Monkey
programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet some elands and colobus monkeys.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Waffle feels left out of the Brooklyn-Bells fun, so he sets off to find his doggy family. Later, Mrs Hobbs meets Pepper.

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Oona, Baba and Otto search for a special bird - the White Egret!

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.sub-title: I Just Want to Be Me
programme.desc: The gang sing a punk rock anthem about how wonderful it is to just be yourself.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Sonny thinks he has found a box of broken junk, but it actually contains parts of something very special. Can Yukee and her friends put all the pieces back together again?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: A severe weather warning from Duggees barometer leads the Squirrels to round up all the creatures they can find outside and pile into the clubhouse for an impromptu party, earning their Get Indoors badges in the process!

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Yakka Dee! celebrates children communicating - because talking fills you up with whizz, pop, bang! In this episode, Dee encourages a friend to say car and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different cars and explore how they look and what they do. We see a big car, a little car and a child whose bed is a car. Theres a yucky dirty car, Dee takes a bath with a clean car and someone has a car cake for their birthday.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Calling all space cadets! One Hundred is on a mission to explore a mysterious signal coming from the depths of space. With the help of the Times Tables, she positions a massive receiver, to make the signal as strong as possible, and connects it to the 10 by 10 hyper-booster grid. Its time for the Times Tables to zoom down to Numberland and assemble a team of brave Number Explorers to help them investigate what the signal is.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: When A discovers a magic red nose, she gets up to all sorts of cheeky five-letter mischief.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Down on the river, Justin and his friends learn to paddle a bell boat and have a sing song. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble joins Fisherman Tumble by the water as they go duck spotting.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubby Custard Machine is broken, but The Noo-noo fixes it. The Teletubbies go on a Tubby Custard Ride and make a lovely custardy mess inside and outside Home Dome.

programme.title: Patchwork Pals
programme.desc: Patchwork Ladybird has a problem: her dots are gone. The Patchwork Pals help her to find them.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa and the Night Noises
programme.desc: Raa Raa and his friends get lost in the dark while out looking for fireflies, but Raa Raa guides the way back home.

programme.title: Chuggington
programme.desc: Tai and the trainees learn that with a little imagination any ordinary job can be extraordinary.

programme.title: Gigglebiz
programme.desc: Keith Fitt makes another world record attempt - this time hes trying to juggle the greatest number of teddies ever. Loveable Humphrey stretches himself at a yoga class whilst the Lost Pirate finds himself marooned on a desert island that looks a little bit like a sandpit.

programme.title: Andys Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels through time on another prehistoric adventure, this time landing 30 million years ago in Mongolia, where he meets the paraceratherium, a giant mammal that is five times the size of a rhinoceros.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers are five friends who travel through space exploring fantastic planets with one big mission: to discover, play and collect all the games in the universe.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When Shellington and the crew try to gather some skittish crabs who have drifted away from home, they get help from some old friends.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of Cotton-tails New Friend
programme.desc: When Cotton-tail leaves the burrow in search of her new playmate, the Shrew, Peter must scour the woods and find his sister before a hungry Old Brown does.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Its Duggees Day Off but its not long before the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures on their days off, earning their Day Off badges in the process!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Popcorn breaks the x-ray machine and does everything he can to fix it before Vida finds out.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: When Evil Pea gets frozen in ice, Corn decides to take over and become Evil Corn.

programme.title: Weasy Family
programme.desc: Weasy hits his head and loses his memory! Can the Ducklings help him remember them?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he wont let them use Mojos tops. But camping Prestons way soon starts a fire - its Mojo and Bo to the rescue!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Flutter buys a new fishy pet from slippery salesman Mervyn, only for the Piripenguins to get stuck in its gloopy slime. Can the friends find a solution to their sticky situation?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloes party and Bingo isnt invited. When a passing cockatoo drops a feather, Bingo has an idea for a new game called `Featherwand, and when she waves her Featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy.

programme.title: Andys Dino Island
programme.desc: When Andy finds a small, unidentified dinosaur rifling through his things, he sets out on an epic adventure across Dino Island to uncover the identity of the mysterious creature.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Waffle, Simon, Doug, Evie and Ruby do a sponsored silence to raise money for the school. Its not much fun, so Mrs Hobbs suggests they do a jigsaw. Waffle finds the missing piece.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafi loves bouncing on the trampoline and wishes she could keep bouncing all day. Her feet become bouncy like trampolines, and at first it feels brilliant. But bouncing everywhere makes simple jobs tricky - cups topple over, eggs splatting, and even hugs are hard. Rafi doesnt want help, but soon she sees that bouncing all the time isnt as fun as she thought. With her dads, she realises its okay to ask for help. Together they share pancakes, laughter, and a big upside-down hug.

programme.title: JoJo and Gran Gran
programme.sub-title: Its Time to Post a Picture
programme.desc: JoJo has drawn a picture to show Great Gran Gran over a video call, but just as shes about to show it, the internet goes down! Gran Gran suggests they post JoJos picture to Great Gran Gran in Saint Lucia.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: After a night of strong rain, the Shallots set sail on a seafaring adventure.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Major Clanger is making too much noise in his workshop and Mother is fed up with it. She suggests they should swap jobs. But Grannys attempt to make the soup proves tricky, and the less said about the Soup Dragons knitting the better.

programme.title: Beddybyes
programme.sub-title: Up and Down and Upside Down
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa explore up, down and upside down in many different forms.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: The ball bounces around the garden visiting one character after another. They all enjoy playing with it until it reaches Makka Pakka and his Uff-uff blows it right away.

programme.title: Cbeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.sub-title: P-T: Jade Thirlwall: The Dress in the Window
programme.desc: Jade Thirlwall reads a beautiful story about a little boy who dreams of a special outfit. The Dress in the Window is by Robert Tregoning and illustrated by Pippa Curnick.

programme.desc: Sanichari is a rudaali, a professional mourner. After her husband dies, she joins a tribe of bonded labourers. programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries

Meanwhile, Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper, Roy - without seeing him first - for Phoebes bachelorette party. Also, Chandler and Ross attend a college reunion and meet an attractive woman they both promised not to date during school.

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel makes the mistake of going for a job interview at a restaurant where her current boss is also dining. Phoebe discovers she can change her name to whatever she likes - Princess Consuela Bananahammock seems the logical choice, until Mike proves that two can play her game - and Joey, upset that Chandler and Monica are moving, is comforted by an eight-year-old.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throw a farewell party for her. Instead of facing them all together, she takes each of them aside for a private goodbye. One friend is offended when he is excluded. Meanwhile, Monica barks out orders as she packs precisely for her life in the suburbs with Chandler, and they watch closely the pregnant mother of their future adopted child.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Truth About London
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly reminisce about London until a startling revelation leaves Chandler floored. Meanwhile, Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes to play on Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Monica regrets telling a fellow bride-to-be about a cheaper bridal shop, and later she has to fight the woman tooth and nail for a unique wedding dress before competing with her to hire Chandlers favourite band for the night. Meanwhile, Joey and Ross discover that theyre dating the same girl.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is overjoyed to be nominated for a `Soapie, the third most prestigious award in daytime dramas. programme.sub-title: The One With Ross and Monicas Cousin

programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throw a farewell party for her. Instead of facing them all together, she takes each of them aside for a private goodbye. Meanwhile, Monica barks out orders as she packs precisely for her life in the suburbs with Chandler, and they watch closely the pregnant mother of their future adopted child.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Airing from 2005 to 2009 on NBC, the game show series returns to primetime TV with original host Howie Mandel. A contestant must choose from 26 sealed briefcases containing a marker for various amounts of cash -- from one penny to $1 million. The player then eliminates the remaining 25 cases one by one. The chosen ones are opened and the amount of money inside revealed. After several cases are opened, the player is tempted by the Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for not continuing the game and possibly winning a larger sum of money.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.desc: Bart feels sorry for Mrs Krabapple after Skinner stands her up again to attend to his mothers whims, so Lisa suggests he should nominate her for Teacher of the Year. However, Skinner worries that he could lose her if she wins.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Manny find out theyve got more in common than they thought, while Cameron and Gloria spend some quality time together.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: In Vilamoura in southern Portugal, thrill-seeking is the name of the game as the group reach dizzying new heights while parasailing. An afternoon learning the art of ju-jitsu gives the celebs a chance to let out some of their pent-up anger.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa taunts Bart about his inability to keep a girlfriend, he convinces the family to visit New York City to find Mary Spuckler.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that has the potentially to destroy Springfield; The Simpsons install cameras all over the house when things start to go bump in the night; Bart travels to 1974 to buy a comic book at cover price but inadvertently disrupts Homer and Marges courtship.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren decides who he wants, but is he too late? Meanwhile, friends gather around to support Diane and Tony.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are torn over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off, spelling disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.

programme.title: Beyond Chelsea
programme.desc: Everyone is excited to celebrate Binkys birthday, but awkwardly for her, its not the warmest of receptions as Lucy and Rosies friendship turns frosty. And Rosie drops a revelation to Binky and Ollie Locke that shes been dating someone.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The First Dates restaurant opens its doors for a special episode in aid of Stand Up To Cancer. Fred and his team welcome hopeful single people from across the country and some familiar faces from the world of show business.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: After dating a few love rats, 24-year-old beautician Gemma wants to find prince charming. Fed up with men, 28-year-old tattoo artist Jennafer seeks the perfect woman.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with King Arthurs rule of peace and freedom, Malagant, an erstwhile ally, turns against the Round Table and establishes a hostile domain. However, he goes too far when he kidnaps the queen and imprisons her in an appalling dungeon. The special skills of the glittering and impetuous swordsman Lancelot must be called upon to effect her rescue.

programme.title: The Northman
programme.desc: Prince Amleth is on the verge of becoming a man when his father is brutally murdered by his uncle, who kidnaps the boys mother. Two decades later, Amleth is now a Viking whos on a mission to save his mother, kill his uncle and avenge his father.

programme.title: Ravenous
programme.desc: Chilling hybrid of black humour and gore set in the US during the 19th century as a stranger arrives at a remote military outpost, claiming to be the sole survivor of a group who became stranded and resorted to cannibalism for survival. Setting out to investigate his claims, the soldiers discover that the truth is even more disturbing than the wanderers story.

programme.title: The Transporter 2
programme.desc: Professional driver Frank Martin is living in Miami, where he is temporarily filling in for a friend as the chauffeur for a government narcotics control policy-maker and his family. The young boy in the family is targeted for kidnapping, and Frank immediately becomes involved in protecting the child and exposing the kidnappers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond celebrates the opening of her new sweet shop. She makes an incredible jewelled divinity and two over-the-top ice cream sundaes.

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: On the menu this time are super sizzling seared scallops with black pudding and speedy mashed spuds with peas. Theres also Jamies egg and mango chutney flatbreads, rib-eye steak, and Jamies almond pastry puff.

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks up his snappy sesame seared tuna, a delicious meal in minutes, and messy meatball buns, feel-good family food thats fast and loaded with flavour, followed by his irresistibly gooey chocolate rye cookies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Inas got vegetable ideas for every day of the week, when youre stuck in a vegetable rut. There are fantastic main courses, starters, salads and sides.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Dinner on day one of Ina and Jeffreys California trip is chicken with wild mushrooms and green salad. The fun continues with an invitation to cook baked goat cheese at Sinskeys vineyard.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The baking challenge is back, welcoming the tents youngest-ever baker and the oldest. Theyll be cooking a Swiss roll, Marys classic cherry cake, and 36 miniature British cakes.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers cook biscuits for a cheese course, Marys Florentines and finally a 3D biscuit scene showstopper.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks up some versatile meatball kebabs, delicious crispy pork noodles with sticky ginger and garlic, a magnificent carrot puff pastry and a humble crumble, all for under a quid per portion.

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie makes sticky toffee pudding with his mum Sally. He also rustles up the perfect steak and onion sandwich, and cooks an Italian classic - osso buco with saffron risotto.

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie takes on three comfort food classics. First up is a retro treat: chicken Kiev. He also cooks spaghetti vongole with a non-traditional pink twist, and creates a deluxe shepherds pie - made with slow-roasted lamb shoulder instead of mince.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In New Yorks Lower East Side, pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings, in Eureka, Calif., Mediterranean favourites, in Miami, Fla., whole fried snapper and beer braised baby back ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Eateries in Key West, FL, include a little shack serving up New England seafood, standout fish tacos, a tiny food cart serving Asian-Caribbean fusion dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Miami, Fla., loaded chimi burrito and lobster lollipops; in Sandy, Utah, Canadian bacon and potato croquettes and white bean and steak pizza; in Salt Lake City, ten ounce meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Miami, Fla., comfort food like spicy oxtail and big ragu; in Park City, Utah, chivito club and chicken bowl with rice; a mom and pop ski lodge serving up pork osso buco, vegetarian mushroom stroganoff and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: The pursuit of Americas greatest chow-downs has led Adam Richman to Omaha, Nebraska. Adam begins his culinary journey by trying the famous Godfather sandwich at Amatos Cafe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans search for iconic chow-down joints has led him to the beautiful island of Oahu. Adams first stop is Hanks Haute Dogs, where hell try a Chicago-style frank with an Hawaiian twist.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.sub-title: Holly Jolly Hoboken and Ugly Sweaters
programme.desc: Its the holiday season, and team makes a cake for the New York Botanical Garden train show. Plus, the team creates an ugly sweater cake.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Buddy is challenged to create a piñata cake by two 11-year-old DJs. Plus, two expectant mothers order gender-reveal cakes - will it be pink or blue?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.
